items.html: *ZON [Zeir Anpin and Nukva] have externality [Hitzoniut] and internality [Pnimiut]. At first, all the discernments of the externality of ZON were clarified and corrected in three times — Ibur [conception], Yenika [suckling], and a second Ibur, of the Mochin — as above in Chapters 1 and 2. Afterwards, ZON returned a second time to be corrected in the discernment of internality; and there were then in them another Ibur, Yenika, and Mochin, after the externality had been made — likewise in three discernments: Ibur, Yenika, and Ibur of the Mochin, as mentioned. Thus there were in ZON four Iburim and two Yenikot, for the two discernments, externality and internality.
